---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or skill for Bio-OM Expert
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**What do you want to do?**
Describe the content operation or workflow you want to automate.

**Example input**
What would a user type to trigger this? e.g., "写一篇竞品分析报告"

**Expected output**
What files or content should the skill produce?

**Dependencies**
Does this skill depend on other skills running first? (e.g., needs web-research before content-writing)

**Additional context**
Any other details about the use case.
